# NOSH7

> NOSH7 is a pure vegetarian healthy meal delivery service (cloud kitchen) in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Nutritionist designed salad bowls are made fresh every morning and delivered the same day across 16+ Ahmedabad neighbourhoods. Subscriptions start at Rs 200 per day.

Key facts:

- 10,000+ customers served, 1,300+ active subscribers
- Ratings: Google 4.6, Swiggy 4.8, Zomato 4.4 (1,000+ reviews)
- Pricing: 5 day trial Rs 1,250 (code TRIAL gives Rs 150 off), monthly plan Rs 4,999 for 25 days (Rs 200 per day)
- 100% vegetarian (no eggs, meat or fish), Jain option available (no onion, garlic or root vegetables)
- Same day delivery: order by 10am, delivered between 6pm and 7pm
- Bowls are calorie counted with protein and fibre listed; options for weight loss, high protein, diabetes, PCOD and thyroid
- Kitchen address: 5A Akshat Avenue, Ramdevnagar Road, Satellite, Ahmedabad 380015
- Phone and WhatsApp: +91 97129 89498
- Order online: https://www.nosh7.com/order

## Main pages

- [Home](https://nosh7.in/): homepage with menu, plans and delivery areas
- [Subscription plans](https://nosh7.in/subscription.html): trial and monthly plan details
- [Ahmedabad delivery](https://nosh7.in/ahmedabad.html): all delivery areas in Ahmedabad
- [Health blog](https://nosh7.in/blog.html): nutrition guides by the NOSH7 team
- [English site](https://www.nosh7.com/): main English website and online ordering

- [Jain diet food](https://nosh7.in/jain-diet-food-ahmedabad.html)
- [Healthy tiffin service](https://nosh7.in/blog-healthy-tiffin-ahmedabad.html)

## Delivery neighbourhoods

Satellite, Prahlad Nagar, Bodakdev, Vastrapur, Navrangpura, Thaltej, Bopal, Sola, Vejalpur, Paldi, Sarkhej, Ashram Road, Juhapura, Sabarmati, Makarba, Mithakhali, Pachvati and University Area. Area pages follow the pattern https://nosh7.in/[area]-ahmedabad.html
